title: RLinf/RLinf
abstract:
RLinf: Reinforcement Learning Infrastructure for Embodied and Agentic AI

[ ](README.md) [ ](README.zh-CN.md) RLinf: Reinforcement Learning Infrastructure for Embodied and Agentic AI RLinf is a flexible and scalable open-source RL infrastructure designed for Embodied and Agentic AI. The 'inf' in RLinf stands for `Infrastructure`, highlighting its role as a robust backbone for next-generation training. It also stands for `Infinite`, symbolizing the system’s support for open-ended learning, continuous generalization, and limitless possibilities in intelligence development. ## What's NEW! - [2026/07] 🎉 RLinf v0.3 is released with major upgrades in the real-world RL full pipeline (data collection → SFT → RL → deployment), more simulators and SOTA models, and system-level optimizations. Release notes: [RLinf v0.3](https://rlinf.readthedocs.io/en/latest/rst_source/resources/release_v0.3.html). - [2026/07] 🔥 RLinf supports RLT for online RL fine-tuning of VLA policies. Doc: [RLT](https://rlinf.readthedocs.io/en/latest/rst_source/examples/embodied/rlt.html). - [2026/06] 🔥 RLinf supports STEAM for offline advantage estimation and policy optimization. Doc: [STEAM](https://rlinf.readthedocs.io/en/latest/rst_source/examples/embodied/steam.html). - [2026/06] 🔥 RLinf supports reinforcement learning fine-tuning for [GR00T-N1.7](https://github.com/NVIDIA/Isaac-GR00T). Doc: [RL on GR00T-N1.7](https://rlinf.readthedocs.io/en/latest/rst_source/examples/embodied/gr00t.html). - [2026/06] 🔥 RLinf supports reinforcement learning fine-tuning with the Polaris simulator. Doc: [RL on Polaris](https://rlinf.readthedocs.io/en/latest/rst_source/examples/embodied/polaris.html). - [2026/06] 🔥 RLinf supports reinforcement learning fine-tuning for [GR00T-N1.6](https://github.com/NVIDIA/Isaac-GR00T). Doc: [RL on GR00T-N1.6](https://rlinf.readthedocs.io/en/latest/rst_source/examples/embodied/gr00t.html). - [2026/06] 🔥 RLinf supports reinforcement learning fine-tuning for Genesis. Doc: [RL on Genesis](https://rlinf.readthedocs.io/en/latest/rst_source/examples/embodied/genesi
abstract_zh: RLinf是一个灵活且可扩展的开源强化学习基础设施，专为具身与智能体AI设计。名称中的“inf”代表“Infrastructure”（基础设施），强调其作为下一代训练稳健后端的角色；同时也代表“Infinite”（无限），象征系统对开放式学习、持续泛化以及智能发展无限可能性的支持。最新进展包括：支持GR00T-N1.7、Polaris模拟器、Genesis等平台的强化学习微调；通过系统级优化（精简、按需观测、混合流水线并行），在BEHAVIOR模拟器上实现了端到端加速，将rollout延迟从1028.7毫秒/步降至41.2毫秒/步。
tldr_zh: RLinf是面向具身与智能体AI的开源强化学习基础设施，支持多种平台并实现显著加速。
cover_zh: 强化学习基础设施新突破｜延迟从1028ms降至41ms

judge.reason: 面向具身和智能体AI的强化学习基础设施，支持GR00T、Genesis等仿真器，具备系统级优化，工程价值高。

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：RLinf是一个面向具身和代理AI的强化学习基础设施，支持从数据收集、SFT到RL训练和部署的全流程，集成多种模拟器（如Polaris、Genesis）和模型（如GR00T系列），并提供了RLT、STEAM等优化算法。


# 一、动机

> 现有强化学习基础设施缺乏对具身智能和代理AI的灵活支持，RLinf旨在提供可扩展的开源RL基础设施，支持开放学习与持续泛化。


# 二、方法

> RLinf是一个面向具身和代理AI的强化学习基础设施，支持从数据收集、SFT到RL训练和部署的全流程，集成多种模拟器（如Polaris、Genesis）和模型（如GR00T系列），并提供了RLT、STEAM等优化算法。


# 三、核心实验结果

> 未提供具体性能数字，但宣布了v0.3版本更新，支持真实世界RL全流程、多模拟器和SOTA模型，以及系统级优化。


# 四、对我的启发

> 与课题相关，可作为具身智能研究中强化学习训练的基础平台，但需进一步测试其实际效果和易用性。
